Hi! I saw your comment on my video and I wanted to respond but I’m trying not to draw attention to what I’m doing bc apparently TikTok is watching people who do this. Anyways, there is a loop hole to the 5 video limit. Essentially, you film as many videos as you want put them in drafts and then on Mondays when the limit resets, you need to add links to ALL the videos before you post videos for the week. When you do that, you can post as many as you want. So what I do is take a screen recording of the products I’m planning to post for the week. I’ll add those screen recordings to my drafts then first thing Monday morning, I add product links to all of them. The screen recordings are basically fillers for my actual video. When I’m ready to record the actual video, I can go to the screen recording, hit edit, and then film the actual video and delete the screen recording. From there, you can edit and post as normal. Technically, this is against the rules and supposedly TikTok knows people are doing this, are keeping an eye on them, and could result in an account ban. How true that is, I don’t really know, but I just make sure to follow all guidelines to avoid any violations to draw attention to my account, and not make videos on how to do this lol hopefully that makes sense! If you have any questions, just let me know!

Chat History with tiff.christi:.Content: It’s a tough time to start over! With the natural slow down of spending in the beginning of the year and the switch over I think a lot of people are feeling it but I think everything will level out again! I have learned multiple accounts is key!!! I have always kept analytics in a spreadsheet and ran them through ChatGPT to be able to track growth. I started realizing it seemed like the two accounts I was posting on never did well at the same time but it would switch back and forth between which one was doing well. I asked chat specifically to look into it and found that about every six weeks one account would slow but the other would pick up. I knew this passion had to be from God. Even my husband said he’s never seen me so passionate or dedicated to something. I had even prayed for God tell me what to do, to open doors, to lead me to people to help me learn what to do. 

I was on a plane at the end of July when I saw your video. I had WiFi so I was editing shop videos when I found it and it was like a punch to the gut (in a good way ☺️). I probably rewatched it 10 times. Tears streaming down my face. I felt so convicted. 

It wasn’t a let me pray so God can make me rich moment, but something so much more. My whole adult life I have prayed that I only want what God wants for me, but the last 9 months I’ve gotten so caught up in what TikTok shop could do for me, what TikTok shop could provide for me, how TikTok shop could change my life - if I could just figure it out. That I forgot to give it to God, to allow God to build this business. So I decided right then and there that everyday, before I did any work on my shop stuff, that I would start my day with God, surrendering my day, my TikTok, my videos, my commissions, everything to God. And like you, ask God to take away anything that he didn’t have planned for me. 

In the last 8 weeks - EVERYTHING has changed. The stress, the anxiety, the need to “hustle harder” GONE. Through choosing to surrender it to him everyday, the results, are in the hands of God. I feel that God has given me a simple strategy for my accounts. Stripped down videos, simple, basic, so that when he moves, I will know that it is him moving - not my videos, not the product selection - just him. 

In the month of August, I made the most I’ve ever made, had no $0 days, had my best week to date, and have been able to post the most amount of videos I’ve ever been able to. And in the first week of September I had my first viral video, at least what I would call viral. Which lead to my first $100 day! 

I swear he’s multiplying my time. The days where I’ve chosen to be obedient and stay in quiet time longer, the days when it seems like the kids are needier than usual or my 9-5 is overwhelming, somehow there’s still just enough time, just enough energy to get the videos done. 

That’s not to say I haven’t seen any hardship. The temptation to fall into comparison to where other people are has been crushing at times, but in those moments I Seek God. The violations, oh the violations. I’ve never had any violations until this last month and I’m talking multiple on both of my accounts - some appealed, some appealed denied. Yet my views and sales have continued to grow. 

Im not one of those people hitting 4 or 5 figure months…yet. But I believe God has been waiting on me, waiting for me to surrender this to him, waiting for me to hand over the control, so he could prepare me, change me, so when the harvest is ready, I will be ready as well. 

I know the risk you took posting that video. I’m sure you lost followers, but you were obedient, and if he hasn’t done so already God will reward you for that. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for being willing to accept the risks that came with posting that video. You are changing peoples lives.
